untranslatable_reason: This signal requires specialized pair trading indicators not in the allowed set: (1) cointegration_test_pvalue - statistical test for cointegrated pairs, (2) spread_zscore - normalized spread between cointegrated assets, (3) half_life_mean_reversion - half-life decay calculation. The strategy operates on constructed synthetic portfolios from pairs rather than single assets, which requires multi-asset correlation and time-series decomposition analysis. Standard single-asset technical indicators cannot capture cointegration relationships, spread dynamics, or mean reversion half-life. A custom cointegration module would be required.
translation_notes: Signal ALGO_SUCCESS_DRY_10_0 is a pair trading/statistical arbitrage strategy fundamentally incompatible with single-asset indicator-based rule translation. Entry requires: cointegration p-value < 0.01, spread > ±2.0 std devs, half-life > 5 days. Exit requires: spread within ±0.5 std devs OR stop at ±3.5 std devs. Parameters include cointegration_pvalue_threshold=0.01, spread_std_dev_entry=2.0, min_half_life_days=5, position_sizing_ratio=0.5. This requires a dedicated cointegration engine outside standard backtester scope.
